runTitle: Local Legacy Vector Graph RAG RPC Cleanup Migration QA
coveredSurfaces: Knowledge Retrieval Lite live RPC smoke

completedImprovements.title: Confirm legacy vector/graph RAG RPCs remain in Supabase
completedImprovements.evidence: Supabase read-only inventory found search_knowledge_base, match_documents, match_knowledge_base, hybrid_search_with_text, hybrid_graph_vector_search, and hybrid_search_vectors still present; search_knowledge_text remains current KRL RPC.

completedImprovements.title: Add migration that drops only unused legacy vector/graph RAG RPC functions
completedImprovements.evidence: Added supabase/migrations/20260510011500_drop_legacy_vector_graph_rag_rpcs.sql and contract tests that preserve search_knowledge_text plus data tables.

completedImprovements.title: Keep legacy data tables out of the RPC cleanup migration
completedImprovements.evidence: Supabase read-only counts found knowledge_base=53, command_vectors=26, knowledge_relationships=170; table deletion requires a separate data migration plan.

notes: This run prepares the repo migration and validates current KRL RPC behavior. It does not apply DDL to the live Supabase database.
Live KRL smoke passed with search_knowledge_text:cpu rows=3 and search_knowledge_text:redis-memory rows=3.
